originContent: # TopicFM+: Boosting Accuracy and Efficiency of Topic-Assisted Feature Matching
translatedContent: # TopicFM+: 주제 기반 특징 매칭의 정확도 및 효율성 향상

originContent: This code implements [TopicFM+](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.00485), which is an extension of [TopicFM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.00328). For the implementation of previous version TopicFM, please checkout the `aaai23_ver` branch.
translatedContent: 이 코드는 [TopicFM+](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.00485)를 구현한 것으로, 이는 [TopicFM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.00328)의 확장판입니다. 이전 버전 TopicFM의 구현은 `aaai23_ver` 브랜치를 참고하십시오.

originContent: ## Requirements
All experiments in this paper are implemented on the Ubuntu environment
translatedContent: 본 논문의 모든 실험은 NVIDIA 드라이버 버전 430.64 이상과 CUDA 10.1이 설치된 Ubuntu 환경에서 수행되었습니다.

originContent: with a NVIDIA driver of at least 430.64 and CUDA 10.1.

translatedContent: 먼저, 다음과 같이 anaconda를 사용하여 가상 환경을 생성합니다,

originContent: First, create a virtual environment by anaconda as follows,
conda create -n topicfm python=3.8
conda activate topicfm
translatedContent: conda install pytorch==1.12.1 torchvision==0.13.1 cudatoolkit=11.3 -c pytorch

originContent: conda install pytorch==1.12.1 torchvision==0.13.1 cudatoolkit=11.3 -c pytorch
pip install -r requirements.txt
# using pip to install any missing packages
## Data Preparation

translatedContent: 제안된 방법은 MegaDepth 데이터셋으로 학습하며 MegaDepth 테스트, ScanNet, HPatches, Aachen Day and Night (v1.1), 그리고 InLoc 데이터셋에서 평가됩니다.

originContent: The proposed method is trained on the MegaDepth dataset and evaluated on the MegaDepth test, ScanNet, HPatches, Aachen Day and Night (v1.1), and InLoc dataset.
translatedContent: 이들 데이터셋은 모두 대용량이므로 본 코드에는 포함되어 있지 않습니다.

originContent: All these datasets are large, so we cannot include them in this code.
translatedContent: 다음 설명은 데이터셋 다운로드에 도움이 됩니다.

originContent: The following descriptions help download these datasets.
### MegaDepth

translatedContent: 이 데이터셋은 학습과 평가 모두에 사용됩니다 (Li and Snavely 2018).

originContent: This dataset is used for both training and evaluation (Li and Snavely 2018).
translatedContent: 본 코드에서 이 데이터셋을 사용하려면 [LoFTR 안내서](https://github.com/zju3dv/LoFTR/blob/master/docs/TRAINING.md)를 따라 주십시오.

originContent: To use this dataset with our code, please follow the [instruction of LoFTR](https://github.com/zju3dv/LoFTR/blob/master/docs/TRAINING.md).
### ScanNet
translatedContent: 평가를 위해 ScanNet (Dai et al. 2017)의 1500개 이미지 쌍만 사용합니다.

originContent: We only use 1500 image pairs of ScanNet (Dai et al. 2017) for evaluation.
Please download and prepare [test data](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1DOcOPZb3-5cWxLqn256AhwUVjBPifhuf) of ScanNet
provided by [LoFTR](https://github.com/zju3dv/LoFTR/blob/master/docs/TRAINING.md).
## Training

translatedContent: 모델 학습 시 가능한 한 GPU 카드를 많이 사용하는 것을 권장하며, 각 GPU는 최소 12GB 이상이어야 합니다.

originContent: To train our model, we recommend using GPU cards as much as possible, and each GPU should be at least 12GB.
In our settings, we train on 4 GPUs, each of which is 12GB.
Please setup your hardware environment in `scripts/reproduce_train/outdoor.sh`.
translatedContent: 그런 다음 다음 명령어를 실행하여 학습을 시작합니다.

originContent: Then run this command to start training.
bash scripts/reproduce_train/outdoor.sh <path to the training config file>
# for example,
bash scripts/reproduce_train/outdoor.sh configs/megadepth_train_topicfmfast.py

translatedContent: 논문에 사용된 사전 학습된 모델을 제공했습니다 ([TopicFM-fast](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DACWdszttpiCZlk4aazhu0IDWvHkLPZf/view?usp=sharing), [TopicFM+](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1RTZJYrKQ593PBJTdxi9k5C4qZ5lSXnf0/view?usp=sharing))

originContent: We provided the pretrained models, which were used in the paper ([TopicFM-fast](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DACWdszttpiCZlk4aazhu0IDWvHkLPZf/view?usp=sharing), [TopicFM+](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1RTZJYrKQ593PBJTdxi9k5C4qZ5lSXnf0/view?usp=sharing))
## Evaluation
### MegaDepth (relative pose estimation)

translatedContent: bash scripts/reproduce_test/outdoor.sh <configs 폴더 내 설정 파일 경로> <사전 학습된 모델 경로>

originContent: bash scripts/reproduce_test/outdoor.sh <path to the config file in the folder configs> <path to pretrained model>
# For example, to evaluate TopicFM-fast
bash scripts/reproduce_test/outdoor.sh configs/megadepth_test_topicfmfast.py pretrained/topicfm_fast.ckpt
### ScanNet (relative pose estimation)

translatedContent: bash scripts/reproduce_test/indoor.sh <configs 폴더 내 설정 파일 경로> <사전 학습된 모델 경로>

originContent: bash scripts/reproduce_test/indoor.sh <path to the config file in the folder configs> <path to pretrained model>
### HPatches, Aachen v1.1, InLoc

translatedContent: 이 데이터셋들에 대한 평가는 Patch2Pix에서 제공하는 image-matching-toolbox에 코드를 통합하여 수행합니다.

originContent: To evaluate on these datasets, we integrate our code to the image-matching-toolbox provided by Patch2Pix.
translatedContent: 업데이트된 코드와 상세 평가는 [여기](https://github.com/TruongKhang/image-matching-toolbox)에서 확인할 수 있습니다.

originContent: The updated code and detailed evaluations are available [here](https://github.com/TruongKhang/image-matching-toolbox).
### Image Matching Challange 2023

translatedContent: 우리의 방법인 TopicFM+는 Kaggle IMC2023에서 높은 순위(은메달)를 달성했습니다 [여기](https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/image-matching-challenge-2023/leaderboard?tab=public).

originContent: Our method TopicFM+ achieved a high ranking (silver medal) on the Kaggle IMC2023 [here](https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/image-matching-challenge-2023/leaderboard?tab=public).
### Efficiency comparison

translatedContent: 논문에서 보고된 효율성 평가는 ScanNet 평가 데이터셋의 1500개 이미지 쌍의 실행 시간을 평균하여 측정했습니다.

originContent: The efficiency evaluation reported in the paper was measured by averaging runtime of 1500 image pairs of the ScanNet evaluation dataset.
The image size can be changed in `configs/data/scannet_test_topicfmfast.py`

translatedContent: LoFTR, MatchFormer, QuadTree, AspanFormer의 연산 비용(GFLOPs)과 실행 시간(ms)을 계산했습니다. 다만, 각 방법별 코드에 약간의 수정이 필요했습니다. 해당 방법들의 평가가 필요하면 연락 바랍니다.

originContent: We computed computational costs in GFLOPs and runtimes in ms for LoFTR, MatchFormer, QuadTree, and AspanFormer. However, this process required minor modification of the code of each method individually. Please contact us if you need evaluations for those methods.

translatedContent: 여기서는 우리 방법인 TopicFM-fast의 실행 시간 측정을 제공합니다.

originContent: Here, we provide the runtime measurement for our method, TopicFM-fast
python visualization.py --method topicfmv2 --dataset_name scannet --config_file configs/scannet_test_topicfmfast.py  --measure_time --no_viz

translatedContent: (640, 480) 해상도에서 측정한 실행 시간 보고서 (NVIDIA TITAN V 32GB 메모리 기준)

originContent: Runtime report at the image resolution of (640, 480) (measured on NVIDIA TITAN V 32GB of Mem.)
| TopicFM-fast  |     56 ms      |      346 ms      |
| TopicFM+      |     90 ms      |      388 ms      |

translatedContent: 이 코드를 유용하게 사용하셨다면, 다음 논문들을 인용해 주세요:
